# Layout

Use this when composition, spacing, or hierarchy feels off.

## Look for
- overcrowded or under-structured screens
- monotonous card stacks
- weak primary action emphasis
- inconsistent spacing rhythm
- misaligned labels, inputs, or action groups

## Preferred fixes
- simplify the structure
- group by meaning, not just by proximity
- use stronger sectioning and hierarchy
- replace repetitive cards with more appropriate layouts when possible
